rationale: The theorem is the bijection between equivalence relations on A and partitions of A: A/R (def:quotient-set, built from def:equiv-class) is a partition (def:partition), each partition induces an equivalence relation (def:equivalence-relation), and the two constructions are mutually inverse. def:partition -- the central concept and the theorem's very title -- was MISSING and is added. def:canonical-surj, def:composition, and def:function are removed: none appears in the statement; they are the dependencies of the neighbouring universal-property theorem (0018), evidently pasted onto the wrong node.
notes: Same 'neighbour's deps pasted in + missing core concept' miswiring class seen in batch-0034 (and mirrored at 0022 here). Confirmed against 0018, where canonical-surj/composition/function are genuinely load-bearing. Multi-edge change -> moderate confidence -> re-run.
